options.content: **Cost by feature (v3.7 P2)** — 從 `model_usage_logs.feature` 分流 chat / workflow / image / stt / tts / rerank。NULL feature 視為 'unknown' (歷史資料)。

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(feature, 'unknown') AS feature, SUM(cost_usd)::float AS cost FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cost DESC

SELECT date_trunc('day', created_at) AS time, COALESCE(feature, 'unknown') AS feature, SUM(cost_usd)::float AS cost FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT conversation_id, SUM(cost_usd)::float AS cost, SUM(total_tokens) AS tokens, COUNT(*) AS calls FROM model_usage_logs WHERE created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) AND conversation_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT u.username, u.email, SUM(m.cost_usd)::float AS cost, SUM(m.total_tokens) AS tokens FROM model_usage_logs m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.created_at >= date_trunc('month', now()) AND m.user_id IS NOT NULL GROUP BY u.username, u.email ORDER BY cost DESC LIMIT 20
